{
  "batch": "Package Organization",
  "batch_index": 4,
  "assessments": {
    "package_organization": 68.0,
    "high_level_elegance": 72.0
  },
  "dimension_notes": {
    "package_organization": {
      "evidence": [
        "holistic_context.structure.directory_profiles shows very large generated folders: goseg/web/_app/immutable/chunks/ has 49 files and goseg/web/_app/immutable/entry/ has 31 files, both entirely in zone=generated.",
        "Assigned generated files (for example 0.f72efb1a.js, 1.0d44cf41.js, 10.35bd59a0.js, _layout.js.984db11e.js) are hash-named wrappers with low standalone navigability, yet they coexist as first-class tracked files alongside authored modules.",
        "Generated (home)-page.svelte.3cdaa764.js imports data/display/store modules from compiled chunk paths (data.a9a4d3e2.js, display.9d848743.js, stores.bc91b4a1.js), creating a second package surface that mirrors source concerns.",
        "ui/src/lib/stores contains fragmented micro-modules: devclass.js exports a single writable, display.js exports two unrelated globals (layout width + version), and data.js mixes connection/runtime mode flags with date utility logic."
      ],
      "impact_scope": "subsystem",
      "fix_scope": "architectural_change",
      "confidence": "high"
    },
    "high_level_elegance": {
      "evidence": [
        "The reviewed set spans two ownership models (authored stores under ui/src/lib/stores and build artifacts under goseg/web/_app/immutable), but generated artifacts are directory-peers in the repo and resemble runtime modules rather than opaque build outputs.",
        "data.js acts as an umbrella state bucket (structure, firstLoad, connected, URBIT_MODE, DEV_PANEL, startramMaxReminderDays, daysUntilDate), indicating domain boundaries are not expressed at package level.",
        "The generated entry/chunk layer presents route and state composition through hashed files, which obscures stable architectural boundaries compared to domain-oriented package entry points."
      ],
      "impact_scope": "subsystem",
      "fix_scope": "multi_file_refactor",
      "confidence": "medium"
    }
  },
  "findings": [
    {
      "dimension": "package_organization",
      "identifier": "generated_artifact_namespace_overlap",
      "summary": "Generated hashed modules form a parallel package namespace that duplicates source concerns and degrades navigability.",
      "related_files": [
        "goseg/web/_app/immutable/chunks/0.f72efb1a.js",
        "goseg/web/_app/immutable/chunks/1.0d44cf41.js",
        "goseg/web/_app/immutable/chunks/10.35bd59a0.js",
        "goseg/web/_app/immutable/entry/_layout.js.984db11e.js",
        "goseg/web/_app/immutable/entry/(home)-page.svelte.3cdaa764.js"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "Directory profile reports 49 files in immutable/chunks and 31 in immutable/entry, all generated.",
        "Files such as 0.f72efb1a.js, 1.0d44cf41.js, and 10.35bd59a0.js are wrapper modules with opaque hash names and no domain-identifiable ownership.",
        "(home)-page.svelte.3cdaa764.js imports compiled modules named data/display/stores from chunks, mirroring source module roles in a second tree."
      ],
      "suggestion": "Staged reorg plan: (1) move generated web artifacts under an explicit build-output root (for example goseg/web/build/immutable/) and treat it as publish artifact only; (2) keep only authored Svelte/UI source under stable domain folders; (3) update build/deploy paths to point to new output folder; (4) update imports/references with `rg -n \"_app/immutable|/immutable/\" goseg ui` and adjust config; (5) validate with `npm --prefix ui run build` and `rg -n \"goseg/web/_app/immutable\" .` to confirm no stale references.",
      "confidence": "high",
      "impact_scope": "codebase",
      "fix_scope": "architectural_change",
      "root_cause_cluster": "artifact_boundary_missing"
    },
    {
      "dimension": "package_organization",
      "identifier": "store_package_mixed_concerns",
      "summary": "Store modules are organized as micro-files and mixed utility buckets instead of clear domain packages.",
      "related_files": [
        "ui/src/lib/stores/data.js",
        "ui/src/lib/stores/devclass.js",
        "ui/src/lib/stores/display.js"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "data.js mixes runtime connectivity flags, mode toggles, UI reminder settings, and a date utility function in one file.",
        "devclass.js holds only one store export, while display.js combines responsive state and build version state.",
        "Current placement favors file-per-variable drift and weak thematic boundaries across sibling store modules."
      ],
      "suggestion": "Staged reorg plan: (1) create target folders `ui/src/lib/stores/runtime/`, `ui/src/lib/stores/ui/`, and `ui/src/lib/utils/time/`; (2) move `connected/firstLoad/structure` to runtime, `wide/DEV_PANEL/startramMaxReminderDays` to ui, `daysUntilDate` to utils; (3) merge single-export micro-stores where domain-aligned (for example devclass into runtime profile/domain store); (4) update imports via `rg -n \"from '\\$lib/stores/(data|devclass|display)'|from \\\"\\$lib/stores/(data|devclass|display)\\\"\" ui/src`; (5) validate with `npm --prefix ui run build` and `npm --prefix ui run check`.",
      "confidence": "high",
      "impact_scope": "subsystem",
      "fix_scope": "multi_file_refactor",
      "root_cause_cluster": "domain_boundaries_implicit"
    },
    {
      "dimension": "high_level_elegance",
      "identifier": "unclear_ownership_between_source_and_compiled_ui",
      "summary": "Architectural ownership is blurred because authored state packages and compiled runtime packages expose similar responsibilities.",
      "related_files": [
        "ui/src/lib/stores/data.js",
        "ui/src/lib/stores/display.js",
        "goseg/web/_app/immutable/entry/(home)-page.svelte.3cdaa764.js",
        "goseg/web/_app/immutable/entry/(home)-layout.svelte.443ba7fd.js"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "Generated page entry composes behavior from compiled `data`, `display`, and `stores` chunks, while authored stores live under ui/src/lib/stores with similar conceptual roles.",
        "Reviewed entry files are framework wrappers and routing glue, but repository-level placement does not clearly separate source ownership from generated runtime ownership."
      ],
      "suggestion": "Staged reorg plan: (1) establish explicit top-level ownership split: `ui/src/**` as source-of-truth and `goseg/web/build/**` as generated artifact; (2) document move order in build scripts first, then relocate artifact path, then adjust deploy/static serving; (3) update references using `rg -n \"_app/immutable|build/immutable\" goseg ui`; (4) verify architecture with `npm --prefix ui run build` and end-to-end smoke test of home layout/page routes after artifact path switch.",
      "confidence": "medium",
      "impact_scope": "subsystem",
      "fix_scope": "architectural_change",
      "root_cause_cluster": "artifact_boundary_missing"
    }
  ],
  "retrospective": {
    "root_causes": [
      "Generated artifacts are stored in a path that behaves like source packages, so ownership boundaries are implicit rather than enforced.",
      "Store organization grew by accretion (new writable per need) instead of domain-first package design."
    ],
    "likely_symptoms": [
      "generated_artifact_namespace_overlap",
      "unclear_ownership_between_source_and_compiled_ui",
      "store_package_mixed_concerns"
    ],
    "possible_false_positives": []
  }
}
